headline: Intel, Exxon, and 10 More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
summary: This breakneck tech rally still has legs—and it’s driving the stock market higher.  The tech rally was being driven by chip stocks again, as  Intel  climbed 2.8%,  Micron Technology  jumped 6%, and  Sandisk  added 3.3% ahead of the opening bell.  The on-again, off-again talks between the U.S. and Iran have led to oil prices sliding—and oil stocks were weighing on the S&P 500 and the Dow.

headline: USO, UCO, BATL, XOM Slip: Oil Dips Below $100 After Trump Says Iran Talks ‘Proceeding Nicely’
